title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Testbook - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Testbook - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!
